metadata.description: Pulse: validate-first multi-agent skills for phase contracts, stories, swarming, and execution

plugins.name: pulse
plugins.description: Pulse: validate-first multi-agent skills for phase contracts, stories, swarming, and execution

plugins.name: pulse:brainstorming
plugins.description: Turn vague intent into an approved design spec through structured dialogue before planning begins

plugins.name: pulse:preflight
plugins.description: Validate required tools, choose full or degraded mode, and write project tooling status before any Pulse workflow

plugins.name: pulse:using-pulse
plugins.description: Bootstrap meta-skill: routing, go mode, skill catalog, state bootstrap/resume

plugins.name: pulse:exploring
plugins.description: Extract locked decisions via Socratic dialogue before planning begins

plugins.name: pulse:planning
plugins.description: Research codebase, write a phase contract and story map, then decompose into executable beads

plugins.name: pulse:validating
plugins.description: Verify phase contract, story map, and bead graph; spike HIGH risk; polish execution readiness

plugins.name: pulse:swarming
plugins.description: Launch and tend parallel worker agents via Agent Mail

plugins.name: pulse:executing
plugins.description: Per-agent worker loop: self-route from bead graph, implement, close, report

plugins.name: pulse:reviewing
plugins.description: 5 parallel review agents, 3-level artifact verification, UAT gate

plugins.name: pulse:dream
plugins.description: Manual dream-style consolidation over artifacts into durable Pulse learnings

plugins.name: pulse:debugging
plugins.description: Systematic debugging for blocked workers, test failures, and build errors

plugins.name: pulse:systematic-debug-fix
plugins.description: Root-cause-first bug fixing combining systematic debugging with fix tracking and regression lock-down

plugins.name: pulse:gkg
plugins.description: Codebase intelligence via gkg tool for architecture and dependency analysis

plugins.name: pulse:ai-multimodal
plugins.description: Process and generate multimedia content with Google Gemini for advanced multimodal analysis

plugins.name: pulse:simplify-code
plugins.description: Review and simplify code for reuse, quality, efficiency, and clarity

plugins.name: pulse:prompt-leverage
plugins.description: Upgrade raw prompts into stronger execution-ready prompts

plugins.name: pulse:writing-pulse-skills
plugins.description: TDD-for-skills meta-skill with pressure testing and persuasion psychology
